content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(expMs<nowMs+30s)
C: expMs<nowMs+30s ∧ expMs>nowMs-30s
H: skew30_fix
P: expMs<nowMs-30s → 401
V: expMs<nowMs+30s ∧ expMs>nowMs-30s
R: !exp
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(expMs<nowMs+30s).
Constraints: expMs<nowMs+30s and expMs>nowMs-30s.
Hypothesis: 30-second grace window fix.
Plan: expMs<nowMs-30s then 401.
Verify: expMs<nowMs+30s and expMs>nowMs-30s.
Risk: high-risk exp.
Answer target: regression test.
